text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: The Japan Cup is about to begin...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Every runner here is a capable opponent.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
There are many senior racers participating today
as well.
choice_data_list:
Think of this as a learning experience and give
it your all.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I will. Winning here is essential if I ever hope to
get back on track...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash looks ready to take on the world. But
being her trainer, I'm a little worried about
something else.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Um... Spe? Let's have a good race!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Check it out! Spe and Rob Roy are running! It's
been ages since they've participated in a race!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. They were on a tear a while ago, but it's
seriously been a long time.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Get this, though! They've both won the Japan
Cup before.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Rob Roy's tenacity gave her a huge following, and
there's so much power in Spe's stride... This one's
going to be a photo finish, I reckon!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa... They're head and shoulders above the
rest when it comes to experience, huh?

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
The classic racers sure have their work cut out for
them...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
There is so much speculation floating around,
but...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I will do what I must. I won't lose out to the
seniors!
